scenes.purpose: Meet main character, JASON, as he logs on for work.
scenes.objective: Fix the feedback loop glitch before his boss arrives.
scenes.turning_point: Jason's fingers fly over keys in a frantic attempt to debug.

scenes.purpose: Show the Ghost in Shell entity, SAGE, trapped in an infinite loop.
scenes.objective: Break free from the code repetition.
scenes.turning_point: Sage's repetitive movements suddenly cease as she spots Jason.
beats: Recognition and shock at being trapped

scenes.purpose: Jason discovers the Ghost in Shell entity is Sage, a former colleague.
scenes.objective: Figure out how to connect with her.
scenes.turning_point: Sage's identity as Jason's ex-teammate clicks into place.

scenes.purpose: Jason and Sage meet face-to-face for the first time in years.
scenes.objective: Help her escape the feedback loop.
scenes.turning_point: Sage's physical form fades away as she merges back into the system.

scenes.purpose: Jason reports to his boss with the issue resolved.
scenes.objective: Get praised for solving the glitch.
scenes.turning_point: Boss scolds Jason instead, accusing him of procrastination and reckless use of company resources.
